full_text:
Ruan Xian 阮咸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ruan Xian (阮咸). One of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove, criticized for chasing after his slave lover. Ruan Xian was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Ruan Xian lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
